description: SMTP-to-msg bridge. Receives email through the UnitySVC SMTP gateway and forwards it to the customer's HTTP endpoint as a strict `{title, body, type, format}` notification envelope (the Apprise-api `/notify` shape — a drop-in for any apprise-api, mailrise, or compatible receiver). The email subject becomes `title`, the body becomes `body`. The upstream URL is resolved from the customer secret `HTTP_RELAY_BASE_URL`; if the receiver requires auth, set `HTTP_RELAY_API_KEY` (forwarded as `Authorization: Bearer`).
name: smtp-to-msg

payout_price.description: Free — customer provides own HTTP receiver
